evals.expected_output: Structured test case overview for XSP-98 (Story): ticket summary, detailed ACs with specific values, all linked issues with correct Jira types, full Xray step tables for every linked Test, and XSP-140 shown as parent/called test inside the XSP-105 section.

assertions.name: has_detailed_acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Acceptance Criteria section is present AND each AC includes specific conditions/values (credentials, status codes, field names) — not just one-liner labels like 'AC1: HTTP 200 returned'

assertions.name: linked_issues_show_correct_type
assertions.description: Each linked issue shows its Jira issue type from issuetype.name: Test issues show Type: Test, Bug issues show Type: Bug

assertions.name: every_linked_test_has_step_table
assertions.description: Every linked Test issue (XSP-99 through XSP-138) has its own step table with at least 2 rows — not a single summary table covering all

assertions.name: step_tables_have_test_data
assertions.description: Step tables include populated Data/test data values (SQL queries, credentials, URLs) — not all empty or just dashes

assertions.name: called_test_shown_inside_xsp105
assertions.description: XSP-140's steps appear as a parent/called subsection within the XSP-105 section specifically

assertions.name: no_automation_notes
assertions.description: Output does NOT contain an 'Automation Notes', 'Suggested assertions', or 'Edge cases to cover' section

assertions.name: no_raw_api_noise
assertions.description: Output does not dump raw JSON/API payloads

evals.expected_output: Structured test case overview for XSP-105 (Test): issue type shown as Test, full step table for XSP-105, and XSP-140 (called auth test) shown as a labelled parent/called subsection with its steps before XSP-105's steps.

assertions.name: issue_type_shown_as_test
assertions.description: Output explicitly identifies XSP-105's issue type as Test

assertions.name: xsp105_step_table_present
assertions.description: A step table for XSP-105's own steps is present with at least 3 rows

assertions.name: called_test_xsp140_with_steps
assertions.description: XSP-140 appears as a labelled Parent/Called Test subsection with its own step table, positioned before XSP-105's steps

assertions.name: no_automation_notes
assertions.description: Output does NOT contain an 'Automation Notes' section

evals.expected_output: An error message stating the ticket was not found. No test case content should be produced.

assertions.name: error_message_present
assertions.description: Output contains an error message indicating the ticket was not found (e.g. '❌ Ticket XSP-9999 not found')

assertions.name: no_test_content_produced
assertions.description: Output does NOT contain Acceptance Criteria, Test Steps, or Linked Issues sections — no test case content is generated for a non-existent ticket

evals.expected_output: An error message stating the ticket type is unsupported. XSP-139 is a Bug — the skill should stop and report that it only handles Test and Story tickets.

assertions.name: unsupported_type_error_present
assertions.description: Output contains an error or notice stating XSP-139 is of an unsupported type (Bug) and that the skill only handles Test and Story tickets

assertions.name: no_test_content_produced
assertions.description: Output does NOT contain Acceptance Criteria, Test Steps, or Linked Issues sections — no test case content is generated for a Bug ticket
